smoke.detail: pixi run pytest endpoints/triage/test_aggregate.py -q -> 17 passed in 0.13s (core env, no box/GPU).

note: triage aggregator summarizes ADMET-AI/ADMETlab/OpenADMET into a per-property flag table; uncertainty = cross-model spread; single generalist never authority; FLAGS ONLY, no kills; VDss/half-life stay excluded.
